title: Runtime Sanitizers, Dynamic Analysis, and Language Profiles · Spiral Review
summary: Add runtime instrumentation to native and managed-language test profiles. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a sanitizer and dynamic-analysis matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use AddressSanitizer builds to detect memory safety defects in native code.
Use UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer with appropriate recover or trap policy.
Select thread, memory, leak, race, or platform sanitizers according to risk and compatibility.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for gates sanitizers that tests this competency: Run expensive dynamic checks in a documented matrix with symbolized actionable output.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Sanitizer Ci trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

stimulus.title: Sanitizer Ci case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for gates sanitizers that tests this competency: Run expensive dynamic checks in a documented matrix with symbolized actionable output.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A sanitizer finding can be suppressed without root-cause review.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run expensive dynamic checks in a documented matrix with symbolized actionable output. Artifact under review: a sanitizer and dynamic-analysis matrix.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, apply Sanitizer Ci without its stated preconditions, omit the a sanitizer and dynamic-analysis matrix trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Sanitizer Ci for a sanitizer and dynamic-analysis matrix.
The record names the assumption, applies Sanitizer Ci, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Sanitizer Ci record says a sanitizer and dynamic-analysis matrix looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.
